cnbc.title: SpaceX raising $75 billion in record-setting IPO as Nasdaq debut awaits
cnbc.summary: SpaceX is selling 555.6 shares at $135 a piece, raising $75 billion in the largest IPO on record.

cnbc.title: From startup to $1.8 trillion: The investors who took a chance on SpaceX now reap the rewards
cnbc.summary: With SpaceX seeking an IPO valuation of nearly $1.8 trillion, early bets are poised to generate some of the biggest paper gains in venture capital history.

cnbc.title: SpaceX cuts retail IPO allocation to low 20% range, source says
cnbc.summary: The Elon Musk-led company plans to direct a percentage in the low 20s of the offering to retail buyers, according to a person familiar with the matter.

cnbc.title: Trump claims Iran war settled 'subject to finalization,' expects signing in 'next few days'
cnbc.summary: Hours earlier, Trump warned that the U.S. would attack Iran "VERY HARD TONIGHT" and soon take over Iran's oil infrastructure assets, including Kharg Island.

cnbc.title: Trump picks former SEC Chairman Jay Clayton as national intelligence director
cnbc.summary: Trump's announcement came after House Democrats' objections to his pick of Bill Pulte as acting chief ensured that a key national security tool expires Friday.

cnbc.title: Warren questions SpaceX IPO oversight in new letter to stock indexes
cnbc.summary: Sen. Elizabeth Warren seeking answers on changes to index provider waiting periods, protections for retail investors, in a letter obtained first by CNBC.

cnbc.title: What energy insiders in DC are saying about oil prices and a possible Iran deal

cnbc.title: SpaceX IPO won’t ‘break’ the bull market. But investors are worried about what comes next
cnbc.summary: As far as Wall Street is concerned, the stock market has what it takes to absorb the new supply.

cnbc.title: SpaceX soon-to-be millionaires are set to spend big on luxury homes, watches and private jet travel
cnbc.summary: SpaceX employees have to wait to sell their shares, but many are already planning how to spend their windfalls.
